helpful: Full petition text under record/documents/ made the merits and preservation-problem assessment possible without any live retrieval
Per-fee-class grant rates in statpack.json (paid vs IFP) gave a much better anchor than the whole-docket rate
Relist-count and CVSG cuts in statpack.md mapped directly onto this case's signals
gaps: The 'Segment base rate by salience band' table referenced in the prompt is not present in the committed statpack.md, so I could not anchor on the salience-gate slice the evaluator scores against

A signal for 'respondent waived response / CFR issued' as a statpack cut would quantify what is now a qualitative adjustment
notes: Straightforward cell: forward mode, complete provisioning, clear-deny profile; one corpus query sufficed.
